title: Flaky Italian Khus Khus Crumble
description: A fresh and flaky Italian dish featuring khus khus (a type of poppy seed), perfect for a sick-day treat or as an appetizer.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: freshly grated for best flavor and texture

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the khus khus and Parmesan cheese.
Add lemon juice and salt to taste. Stir well until everything is evenly distributed.
Gradually stir in flour and baking powder while continuing to mix until no visible lumps remain.
Slowly drizzle in water while continuously stirring with a wooden spoon or spatula, ensuring the mixture comes together into a crumb-like consistency.
